name: LocalClarity
highlight_text: LocalClarity is a reputation management software platform
description:
What LocalClarity Does

LocalClarity is a reputation management software platform for multi-location businesses and agencies. It equips users to manage their reputation effectively, covering areas like review management, sentiment analysis, analytics, and reporting,   

LocalClarity further helps businesses maximize their online footprint, improving their Google Business Profile (previously Google My Business), and facilitating competitor analysis for insights on building audience engagement.

Source: G2

Key Features

The most important features include: 

  • Review management: some text
    • Monitor online reviews from different review platforms.
    • Get real-time alerts and notifications for new reviews or changes in ratings   
    • Provide human and automated responses to  reviews using customizable response templates
    • Analyze reviews and analyze Provide 
  • Competitor reviews -  Get detailed insights on the strengths and weaknesses of your competitors.
  • Analytics and reporting - Access detailed insights on reviews, ratings, and social media mentions. 
  • Customizable dashboards 

Benefits of LocalClarity

The benefits of using the LocalClarity platform include:  

  • Review management: some text
    • Monitor online reviews from different review platforms on one interface 
  • A customizable dashboard that can be adjusted in line with specific business needs.

Pricing

LocalClarity offers three plans: 

  • Plus: USD 10 / location/month
  • Pro: USD 12 / location/month
  • Enterprise & Agency: customized plan 

Pros

✅ Comprehensive review management 

✅ Affordable platform - especially for new businesses. 

Cons

🚫Requires a strong internet connection

🚫Steep learning curve

‍
